headline: A Dramatic Shift in Fed Policy Just Unlocked a New Era for Bristol Myers Squibb
summary: With the 10-Year Treasury yielding 4.48% and the Fed signaling more cuts ahead, income investors are hunting for yield that compounds. Bristol Myers Squibb (NYSE:BMY) offers a 4.39% yield backed by 94 consecutive years of dividend payments. The pharma giant is rebuilding around a Growth Portfolio (Eliquis, Camzyos, Breyanzi) while legacy drugs face generic erosion. ... A Dramatic Shift in Fed Policy Just Unlocked a New Era for Bristol Myers Squibb
